questionHtml:
A 700 W electric heater is used to heat 1 kg of water without energy losses. The specific heat capacity of water is 4.2 kJ kg–1 K–1. What is the time taken to heat the water from 25 °C to 95 °C?

 

A.   7 s

B.   30 s

C.   7 minutes

D.   420 minutes
